sentences.english: The first thing I do every morning is make coffee, and the whole routine takes exactly seven minutes.
sentences.korean: 매일 아침 가장 먼저 하는 일은 커피 만들기예요. 전체 루틴이 정확히 7분 걸려요.

sentences.english: I go to the same café every morning and the barista already knows my order, which is a large oat milk latte.
sentences.korean: 매일 아침 같은 카페에 가고 바리스타가 이미 주문을 알아요. 큰 오트밀크 라떼요.

sentences.english: I recently switched from coffee to green tea, and I feel less anxious and I sleep better at night.
sentences.korean: 최근에 커피에서 녹차로 바꿨고 불안감이 줄고 밤에 잠을 더 잘 자요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: Mixer #120 — Best Way to Learn English
Mixer #28 — Moving to a New City
